June:.........and so we went to see that new Tim Banks comedy last week. 

Polly: Oh, so_________________we. What did you think? We weren't very impressed.
Polly: I didn't want to go, but Kevin likes that cinema. So_____________I, actually. We've been there hundreds of times.
June: The one in towm? Oh, so__________we. The ice cream there is great, and_______________is the popcorn! I could eat it all night.
Polly: Yes! So____________I! I don't like their drinks, tonight.
June: Oh, no._________________do I. Anyway, we're thinking of going to see what's on this evening.
Polly:_______________are Jack and I. Let's meet up. I don't finish work until seven.
June: _____________do I. I'll see what's on and give you a ring.I'm looking forward to it already.
Polly: So_________________I. Okay, speak to you later
